---
title: "George Collins"
---

## George Collins

**Dates:** (b.1818/9)

### Description

groom and gardener

### Biography

He lived at the Post Office, Otterbourne, with his wife Martha Andrews, the postmistress, and their children George (b. 1839/40),  Charles (b.1840/1), Elizabeth (b. 1844/5),  and Anne (b. 1846/7).  After Martha\'s death he married a younger woman named Emma, who also acted as postmistress of Otterbourne, and had at least one daughter, Frances (b. 1876), who qualified as a teacher and was the mistress of Otterbourne School.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
